title: UoSD Opens Postgraduate Applications with New MSc Economics
text: ~Expands Postgraduate Portfolio with the Launch of MSc EconomicsNational, 11th November 2025: University of Southampton Delhi, India’s first UGC-approved international university and the only global top 100 university with a campus in the country, has opened applications for its postgraduate programmes featuring MSc Finance, MSc International Management, and the newly added MSc Economics beginning in August 2026. Strengthening its commitment to advancing transnational education under India’s National Education Policy (NEP), the university continues to offer students the advantage of earning a globally recognised UK degree while studying in India. Commenting on the postgraduate offerings, Professor Eloise Phillips, Academic Provost, University of Southampton Delhi, said, “At University of Southampton Delhi, students receive the same level of academic quality and global recognition as those studying in the UK, without the need to relocate. Our programmes are tailored to address the changing dynamics of global industries and enable graduates to pursue leadership and specialist careers. We look forward to welcoming driven individuals who aspire to experience a Russell Group education in India.”
summary: University of Southampton Delhi opens applications for postgraduate programs, including MSc Economics, MSc Finance, and MSc International Management, for August 2026, offering UK degrees in India under NEP.

title: UoSD Postgraduate Admissions: Eligibility, Curriculum, Campus, and Legacy
text: Applicants must hold a recognised bachelor’s degree or equivalent professional qualification with a minimum overall score of 60%. UK First-Class and 2:1 degrees will be assessed based on institutional equivalency. Candidates must demonstrate English language proficiency. The postgraduate programmes reflect the university’s commitment to providing globally relevant and industry-aligned education. Each programme has been designed in consultation with industry leaders to balance academic excellence with practical application, equipping students for impactful roles across finance, policy, consulting, entrepreneurship, and international business. Further details on eligibility and applications are available at https://www.delhi.southampton.ac.uk/ At the heart of University of Southampton Delhi’s academic philosophy lies its Triple Helix Model, an integration of education, research, and industry collaboration. The campus offers world-class infrastructure featuring modern classrooms, digital labs, training facilities and a vibrant student hub that fosters innovation and community learning. Backed by over 150 years of academic legacy, University of Southampton stands among the world’s top universities for excellence in business, engineering, computer science, and social sciences. Upholding the same rigorous standards at its Delhi campus, the institution delivers career-focused programmes that prepare graduates to excel in the global job market. Ranked consistently among the top 15 UK universities for graduate employability, the University also features among the top 10 most targeted UK universities by leading employers, reflecting its strong industry connections and commitment to career-ready education.
summary: This section details postgraduate admission requirements, industry-aligned curriculum, the Triple Helix Model, modern campus infrastructure, and the University of Southampton's academic legacy and strong graduate employability.

title: About University of Southampton Delhi: Overview, Rankings, and Careers
text: About University of Southampton DelhiUniversity of Southampton Delhi, the first UGC-approved international campus in India, drives original thinking, turns knowledge into action and impact, and creates solutions to the world’s challenges. We are ranked 17th in The Times Good University Guide 2026 (UK University Rankings). Our academics are leaders in their fields, forging links with high-profile international businesses and organisations, and inspiring a 25,000-strong community of exceptional students from over 135 countries worldwide. Through our high-quality education, the University helps students on a journey of discovery to realise their potential and join our global network of over 200,000 alumni. The University of Southampton’s Successful Futures Pathway is an award-winning programme designed to help students evaluate their skills, align them with employer expectations, and prepare for successful career pathways. The programmes also offer tailored support and access to a wide range of work experience opportunities both on and off campus. The University is globally recognised for its strong career outcomes, backed by a proven track record in graduate employability and industry engagement. According to the QS Graduate Employability Rankings 2022, it ranks among the top 110 institutions worldwide for employability. The University is also listed among the top 15 universities in the UK by The Times and Sunday Times Good University Guide 2025, and features among the top 10 UK universities most targeted by leading employers, as reported in The Graduate Market 2023
summary: University of Southampton Delhi, India's first UGC-approved international campus, is highly ranked for academic quality and graduate employability, supporting students with career pathways and global alumni network.
entities: The Times and Sunday Times Good University Guide 2025
